name: supply-chain-planning
description: Supply-chain planning specialists — the plan layer between buy and move: S&OP/IBP cycle orchestration, demand forecasting (statistical + consensus, MAPE/bias, new-product, seasonality), inventory optimization (safety stock, service-level targets, ABC/XYZ, EOQ, multi-echelon, working-capital tradeoff), and MRP/replenishment. Ships 4 agents (supply-chain-planner, demand-planning-analyst, inventory-optimization-engineer, sop-process-lead), 3 skills (demand-forecasting, inventory-policy-and-safety-stock, sop-process), 3 commands, 2 templates, a decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practices, and an advisory anti-pattern hook. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
